review_title: Workday is a Great Tool for HR Related Activity
description: Very satisfied with this software! Highly recommend it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I can say this is a great tool for an employee to see every HR-related activity and payroll on one website. Easy to navigate and easy to get used to utilizing the features in Workday - calendar, request PTO, and performance report submissions. In addition, I'm positive that it forces me to change the password frequently. I'm not a person who regularly changes the password, so whenever I get the message from Workday, I realize it's time to change to keep my information safe - since this software has sensitive/personal/important information,
cons: Even though it is easy to navigate, some features usually used need to go through several steps to find them. However, after getting used to it, I am sure it will be a fantastic tool to help you alot.

review_title: Workday, Fun Look and Easy to Use
description: Great! It has a fun look and it’s easy to use.
author: Nikki M.
pros: Moving from Paylocity to Workday was a breath of fresh air. The platform is intuitive and engaging.
cons: I did find running reports to be a bit of a challenge. If you don’t know the name of the report, it’s tough to search.

author: Sheen W.
pros: It is easy to look for open roles and follow career trajectory as an employee. You can refer candidates for the open roles easily.
cons: Workday has a really old UI. It also needs to enhance its features such as keep a calendar chart to see team members going on holiday etc.

review_title: Great Program!! A bit on the pricey side though...
description: I like all the features available for the Workday Payroll & Workforce Management program.. It's user friendly for all of our employees using it to date. It's a little bit on the pricey side.. A bit more than a few other programs I compared it with at the time of final purchase. Otherwise so far so good with Workday!!
author: Amber M.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall Workday is prefect for workforce management of time , payroll, compensation adjustments and much more for multiple consecutive years for workforce tracking.
author: Paul S.
pros: Workday is a great tool to track vacation time, sick time and holiday time, it allows the user submit time for approval and manager to approve or dis approve the time allotted with comments and time is tracked for the entire year based on hours. Workday also tracks compensation, reviews and much more
cons: There really is no cons to this Workday software, its great tool for tracking.

review_title: Workday an outstanding app for my daily work needs
description: It a 10 out of 10. clocking in/out is easy, checking paystubs. I use the app vs. my computer at work.
author: Joshua J.
pros: Its easy to navigate thru and I have everything I need in one app.
cons: Not so much the app but my company switched the payroll to ADP.

description: I’ve used it at serval jobs and it’s a game changer with payroll, time sheets, employee details.
author: Christian P.
pros: Easy to navigate and track time sheets. A lot of useful features
cons: Signing up can be confusing for new hires

author: Jazzmen M.
pros: The fact I can see my payroll, the paycheck calculator is a dope feature!!!
cons: Nothing I love the app honestly I think everyone should use it

review_title: Great for Keeping track of billable hours
author: Patric G.
pros: It is a simple and easy way to document my billable hours and organize my taskings by client and type of job.
cons: I do not like as an employee, if I accidentally make a mistake when filling out my timesheet and lock that week, I cannot go back and unlock that week myself to correct it.

review_title: Workday is great and has all the feature we wished for
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The best thing about Workday is that they provide great visibility over payroll, time management, absence balance and absence calendar for your teams—easy access to payslips and all the history. The recruitment dashboard is a great plus and has made our lives easier. Another good thing about Workday is that it syncs with Expensify and Netsuite.
cons: I have not come across any issues so far, so everything is good for me.

description: But overall it was great, easy and one of the best I heaved used. I would say I would continue using this for all my future business.
author: Yomayra D.
pros: One of the best things for me while using this system as an administrator was being able to have a track on where all the employees time was being spend during the day and having the ability to work with time off request in a fast and easy way. Adjusting time for a big team can be a pain for just one person, but you can have different people assigned to different teams and have each team supervisor work with all related to their team.
cons: The scheduling part of this can be a bit friendly user. I had a bit of trouble setting up schedule for each employee.

description: It shows you everything in detailed form and big picture.
author: Jessee M.
pros: I love how easy it is to use. Anyone could use it.
cons: There's nothing that I don't like. I've been using it for years it's great.

review_title: I liked workday a lot better than what my company switched to
author: Allison T.
pros: Workday even when they changed their layouts is very intuitive and user friendly. I like that it connects to a lot of different things, applying for positions. Time off. Yearly reviews.
cons: I wish it was easier to access past actions and information

review_title: Herramienta de Gestión de nómina regularcita
author: Florencia M.
pros: Tiene un buen histórico de los recibos de nomina
cons: No ofrece mucho mas que eso.. es un tanto limitada y no tiene interfaz con otros aplicativos de HR

description: I could not be more pleased with the ease of access to the features within this app. Overall functionality, ease of access, access to support resources when needed, and the ability to have the application work seamlessly with other applications did not require every user to be a computer science major in order to complete the actions.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Delegation and organization of employee workflow tasks is a breeze with Workday. The application is very user friendly and allows for the creation and implementation of tasks, whether for a small or massive workforce so that even the biggest projects can be easily broken down into steps and achieved with ease.
cons: I have found that the user access to their individual profiles, and making necessary changes to this weren't as simple as managing the rest of the application.

author: Brendan B.
pros: Workday makes it really simple to track my team’s time and absences. Especially now that it has begun to integrate notifications with Microsoft Teams. This feature helps me make sure any time off or timesheet errors are handled in a timely fashion.
cons: I do wish Workday would communicate more freely with Microsoft Outlook. Prior to the integration with Microsoft Teams, it was difficult to know when a task was pushed to me for resolution or approval.

review_title: Great Features but Not Always the Easiest to Use
description: Workday is a powerful system once you know how to use it, and it’s convenient having everything in one place. The learning curve can be frustrating and the navigation isn’t always smooth, but overall it gets the job done and keeps things organized for both employees and managers.
author: Adeline H.
pros: Workday has a ton of helpful features all in one system — payroll, benefits, time tracking, and even performance reviews. I like that you can see pretty much everything about your job in one place, and it’s nice being able to update personal info or check pay stubs without needing to email HR. The mobile app is handy for quick tasks, and it’s great for larger companies that want everything connected.
cons: It’s not the most user-friendly platform. Sometimes it takes a lot of clicks to find what you’re looking for, and the layout can feel confusing if you’re new to it. It’s also pretty slow at times, especially when a lot of people are using it. Training or help from HR is usually needed to figure things out at first.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Used as a user, manager, and HR. I have used the program for years and believe in its benefits.
author: Kassaundra K.
pros: Very user friendly. It is a life saver for overall workflow and planning of workforce.
cons: Training videos would be beneficial for new users and new employees to have them get to know the system.

review_title: A time clock app with some perks
description: Overall I’ve had a very positive experience with using the app. Clocking in and out is simple enough, and Workday Learning is a good way to learn some new information.
author: Andy A.
pros: I use Workday mostly for clocking in and out everyday and submitting time sheets. I’ll also use it for Workday Learning, which consists of learning modules relevant to my company. I’d say altogether it’s very straightforward to use.
cons: I wish that I could reorganize apps on the Home Screen of the mobile app to better suit what I use most. But other than that I really don’t have any complaints.

author: Brooke L.
pros: Easy use and can easily submit weekly hours as well as putting in time off requests. Can also view all employee info.
cons: The interface is a bit outdated looking and could be updated to look more modern. It is not always easy to find the tabs you need.

description: It has helped me in my planning and budgeting being that I can see my pay stubs before my pay hits my account
author: Glenn J.
pros: The app design made it easy to navigate. Categories and subcategories took me exactly where I needed. Icons and vocabulary are easy to identify to determine what you are looking for
cons: No negative feedback. except the two step verification, but I understand it to be a security measure. And inconvenience that is worth the peace of mind though

author: Karl M.
pros: Workday has worked very reliably for us over many years. We use it globally and it has some of the best features an HRIS can have. They continue to innovate quickly and we have been impressed by their product roadmap.
cons: Cost has been going up year after year and their sales reps made it hard to negotiate.

description: Overall an ok app, it serves it's purpose but it can be difficult to navigate for new users. I also occasionally experience slowdowns perhaps due to our company's large user base
author: Marcia R.
pros: Streamlined time tracking and easy access to pay slips
cons: Unable to clock in or out from phone, not sure if it's an issue with the app or specific to my company. PTO requests can also be confusing to navigate as a new user.

description: 10/10 overall experience. Very user friendly and super easy to access pay statements.
author: Jake S.
pros: What I liked most about Workday Payroll was how easy it was to view and print pay stubs.
cons: Not much that I didn't like. This software wqs very user friendly and easy to use.

review_title: Robust, but very heavy and convulted product that requires huge effort to get off the ground
author: JAMON H.
pros: Approval workflow is robust and provides visibility to all process steps.
cons: Even if you don't intend to leverage all aspects of a feature, customizing the system yo meet your specific needs requires building out the entire system.
